body:
## Rationale

Inferno (Behemoth) has 12 impressions / 8.33% GSC CTR — a strong conversion signal. We have `evangelion-drum-setup` and `the-satanist-drum-setup` in DB, and `demigod-drum-setup` (#2339) + `apostasy-drum-setup` (#2385) in the ai-fix / proposal queue. 'Thelema.6' (2002) is the album directly before Demigod (2004) and represents the transition from Behemoth's black metal roots to death metal — the gear inflection point between their two eras.

**Dedup confirmed:** `thelema-6-drum-setup` is NOT in albumArticles.js (143 slugs) and NOT in open proposals. Issue #2339 (Demigod) references the arc gap via its title 'fills Thelema.6→The Satanist arc gap' — confirming Thelema.6 itself was intended as a follow-on article.

## Album details
- **Album:** Behemoth — 'Thelema.6' (Avantgarde Music / Metal Blade, 2002)
- **Drummer:** Inferno — roster member
- **Drummer slug:** `inferno`
- **Gear era:** Pearl Masters Premium kit — transition era from black metal blast to death metal technical approach
- **Arc position:** `evangelion-drum-setup` (09) → `the-satanist-drum-setup` (13) → [Thelema.6 fills 2002] → `demigod-drum-setup` (#2339, 2004)
- **Unique angle:** This album documents Inferno's technique evolution from Norwegian-influenced black metal blast to the polyrhythmic death metal style that defines his modern work

## Files to create
- `/packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add `'thelema-6-drum-setup'` entry; relatedAlbums: `['evangelion-drum-setup', 'the-satanist-drum-setup']`
- `/public/llms/articles/thelema-6-drum-setup.md` — LLM companion

## Quality gate
- ≥300 words
- ≥3 FAQ Q&A (Inferno's kit in 2002, transition to death metal style, kit cost estimate)
- ≥3 internal links (inferno profile, evangelion article, satanist article)
- FAQPage JSON-LD via faq field

## Estimated organic uplift
Targets: 'inferno behemoth drum kit 2002', 'thelema 6 drums', 'behemoth early era drummer'. Extends Inferno's already-converting GSC cluster (8.33% CTR). Cross-links to proposed Demigod article when it ships.

## Verify
1. `grep 'thelema-6-drum-setup' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` → returns entry
2. `ls public/llms/articles/thelema-6-drum-setup.md` → file exists
3. Article renders at `/articles/thelema-6-drum-setup` (200 OK)
4. FAQPage schema present on page
5. relatedAlbums links to `evangelion-drum-setup` and `the-satanist-drum-setup` (both live in DB)

## Done
Article live at `/articles/thelema-6-drum-setup` with FAQPage JSON-LD and LLM companion.
title: SEO: Behemoth 'Thelema.6' drum setup article (Inferno, 2002 — fills pre-Demigod arc gap, Inferno at 8.33% GSC CTR)
